raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a {$190.00} charge listed as XXXX XXXX, XXXX that posted to my Best Buy/Citibank account on or around XX/XX/XXXX. I did not authorize, request, or knowingly consent to this renewal service. 

When the charge first appeared, I contacted the company and informed them that I did not approve this transaction. My dispute was later denied without the company providing documentation showing that I actively authorized or knowingly enrolled in the renewal service. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I again contacted the company through their online chat system to formally dispute the charge as unauthorized. During that interaction, I clearly stated that I did not consent to the service and requested that the matter be handled through the billing disputes process. The representative redirected me to another department, referenced contract terms and auto-renewal policies, but did not provide proof of authorization or consent. The chat session was then closed without resolution or a case number being provided. 

Despite my dispute efforts, the company continued collection activity through calls and emails regarding this balance. I also discovered that the disputed amount has now negatively affected my credit reporting. 

I made multiple good-faith attempts to resolve this matter directly with the company and requested documentation showing authorization for the charge. To date, I have not received adequate resolution or proof that I knowingly consented to this renewal. 

I am requesting : Reversal of the disputed {$190.00} charge Removal of related fees, penalties, and interest Removal or correction of negative credit reporting associated with this disputed amount Suspension of collection activity related to this dispute Documentation showing proof of authorization for this charge, if it exists
